meta.title: Veo 3 AI Video Generator | Native Audio | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning videos with native audio using Google's Veo 3. State-of-the-art video generation with realistic physics, sound effects, dialogue, and ambient noise. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Google's most advanced video generation model with native audio. Veo 3 delivers state-of-the-art quality with realistic physics, sound effects, dialogue, scene extension for longer videos, and reference image guidance for character consistency.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Veo 3 the most advanced AI video model

audio.title: Native Audio Generation
audio.description: Generate sound effects, ambient noise, and even dialogue natively. No need for separate audio tools - Veo 3 creates synchronized audio automatically.

physics.title: Realistic Physics
physics.description: State-of-the-art physics simulation ensures natural movement, realistic interactions, and believable object dynamics in every frame.

prompt.title: Superior Prompt Adherence
prompt.description: Improved prompt understanding means more accurate responses to your instructions, capturing exactly what you envision.

quality.title: Cinematic Quality
quality.description: Lifelike quality with immersive soundtracks. Create professional-grade videos that rival traditional production.

control.title: First & Last Frame Control
control.description: Direct Veo 3 to generate smooth transitions between a starting and ending image, complete with accompanying audio for precise scene control.

extension.title: Scene Extension
extension.description: Create longer videos lasting a minute or more by generating new clips that connect to your previous video with visual continuity.

consistency.title: Reference Image Guidance
consistency.description: Guide generation with up to 3 reference images for character, object, or scene consistency across multiple shots and styles.

0.question: What is Veo 3 and who developed it?
0.answer: Veo 3 is a video generation model from Google DeepMind. It can generate high-quality videos and is notable for native audio generation in supported workflows (sound effects, ambience, and dialogue synchronized with the visuals).

1.question: What makes Veo 3 different from other video models?
1.answer: Veo 3 stands out for native audio generation, strong prompt adherence, and creative controls like camera movements and scene extension. It is a great fit when you need sound + video in one pass.

2.question: Can Veo 3 generate dialogue and voiceovers?
2.answer: Yes! Veo 3 can generate dialogue, voiceovers, sound effects, and ambient noise natively. Simply include audio descriptions in your prompt, and Veo 3 will create synchronized audio automatically.

3.question: What video durations does Veo 3 support?
3.answer: Veo 3 generates videos up to 8 seconds long. You can use the scene extension feature to create longer videos by extending clips while maintaining visual and audio consistency.

4.question: What creative controls does Veo 3 offer?
4.answer: Veo 3 offers camera controls (zoom, pan, move), first and last frame specification, style matching with reference images, character consistency, scene extension, and outpainting for different aspect ratios.

5.question: How does Veo 3 compare to Sora 2 and Kling 2.1?
5.answer: Veo 3 leads in native audio generation and realistic physics. Sora 2 can support longer clips depending on mode, and Kling offers strong multi-reference workflows. Veo 3 excels in audio-video synchronization and creative controls.

6.question: How do I choose between Veo 3 and Wan 2.6?
6.answer: If your priority is native audio generation and cinematic realism, start with Veo 3. If you need multi-shot storytelling and longer clip options, Wan 2.6 can be a better fit. Choose based on your target format and whether you need multiple shots in one run.

7.question: What aspect ratios and resolutions are supported on OpenCreator?
7.answer: On OpenCreator, Veo 3 supports common aspect ratios (typically 16:9 and 9:16). Resolution options can vary by workflow, but 720p and 1080p are commonly available.

8.question: How do I prompt for better audio?
8.answer: Explicitly describe the soundscape: environment ambience, key sound effects, and dialogue lines (if needed). Keep audio instructions aligned with the visuals (e.g., footsteps match the walking pace).

9.question: Can I control the camera in Veo 3?
9.answer: Yes. Add camera direction in your prompt (e.g., “slow dolly-in”, “handheld tracking shot”, “wide establishing shot”). Start simple, then iterate.

10.question: Can I extend a video beyond 8 seconds?
10.answer: Veo 3 commonly generates short clips (for example, up to 8 seconds). For longer sequences, you can extend scenes by generating follow-up shots and stitching them in your workflow while keeping style and subject consistent.

11.question: Does Veo 3 support image-to-video and text-to-video?
11.answer: Yes. Veo 3 supports both image-to-video and text-to-video workflows. Use image input when you need stronger subject/style anchoring; use text-only when you want maximum creative freedom.

12.question: How much does Veo 3 cost on OpenCreator?
12.answer: Credits are consumed per generation and can vary by output settings. The pricing section on this page shows the most up-to-date credit cost for your plan.
